title: Trump can halt trade with Spain using law behind scrapped tariffs: Greer
summary_full: Trump asserted that IEEPA authorized him to slap tariffs on nearly every country, but the Supreme Court struck down those import duties.
summary_public: Trump asserted that IEEPA authorized him to slap tariffs on nearly every country, but the Supreme Court struck down those import duties.
